entries.name: Claude Code (Anthropic API)
entries.notes: Usage-based billing. Under $50 total through Feb 2026. Update from console.anthropic.com/billing.

entries.name: AMD Ryzen 9 7900X (CPU)
entries.notes: Estimate — 12c/24t @ 4.7GHz. Shared use (not ChefFlow-exclusive).

entries.name: 128 GB DDR5 RAM (4x 32GB Micron)
entries.notes: Estimate — 5600MHz rated, running 3600MHz. Shared use.

entries.name: NVIDIA RTX 3050 6GB (GPU)
entries.notes: Estimate — 6GB VRAM, CUDA 12.6. Used for local LLM inference. Shared use.

entries.name: ASUS TUF GAMING B850-PLUS WIFI (Motherboard)
entries.notes: Estimate. Shared use.

entries.name: Storage (990 PRO 2TB + 1TB + SU800 512GB + Toshiba 1TB)
entries.notes: Estimate for all drives combined. Shared use.

entries.name: Raspberry Pi 5 (8GB)
entries.notes: Dedicated beta server — always on. ChefFlow-exclusive.

entries.name: Pi microSD Card (128GB)
entries.notes: ChefFlow-exclusive.

entries.name: Pi Power Supply & Peripherals
entries.notes: Estimate — power adapter, case, cables. ChefFlow-exclusive.

entries.name: Pi Electricity (24/7 operation)
entries.notes: ~5 watts continuous. Pennies per month. Update periodically.

entries.name: Vercel (Hobby Tier)
entries.notes: Free tier — production hosting at app.cheflowhq.com. Will need Pro ($20/mo) at scale.

entries.name: Supabase (Free Tier)
entries.notes: Free tier — 500MB DB, 1GB storage, 50K auth MAU. Will need Pro ($25/mo) at scale.

entries.name: Cloudflare (Free Plan)
entries.notes: DNS, DDoS protection, Tunnel to Pi. Free forever for current usage.

entries.name: GitHub (Free Tier)
entries.notes: Source control, CI trigger. Includes Copilot (used as research bot).

entries.name: Resend (Free Tier)
entries.notes: 3,000 emails/month free. Transactional email (quotes, invoices, confirmations).

entries.name: Sentry (Free Tier)
entries.notes: 5,000 errors/month free. Error tracking in production.

entries.name: PostHog (Free Tier)
entries.notes: 1M events/month free. Product analytics.

entries.name: Upstash Redis (Free Tier)
entries.notes: 10K commands/day free. Rate limiting + sales tax caching.

entries.name: OneSignal (Free Tier)
entries.notes: Unlimited web push notifications free. PWA push notifications.

entries.name: Cloudinary (Free Tier)
entries.notes: 25 credits/month free. Image CDN.

entries.name: cheflowhq.com (Cloudflare Registrar)
entries.notes: ~$6.50/year via Cloudflare Registrar. Renews annually.

entries.name: Spoonacular API
entries.notes: 150 req/day free. Ingredient pricing for grocery quotes + wine pairing. Paid: ~$29/mo.

entries.name: Kroger API
entries.notes: Free developer API. Real shelf prices at Kroger-family stores.

entries.name: USDA FoodData Central
entries.notes: 1,000 req/hour free. Authoritative nutrition data (380K+ foods).

entries.name: Geocodio
entries.notes: 2,500 req/day free. Address geocoding.

entries.name: API Ninjas (Sales Tax)
entries.notes: 100K req/month free. Sales tax rates by ZIP code.

entries.name: Unsplash API
entries.notes: 50 req/hour demo, 5K/hour production. Stock food photography.

entries.name: Pexels API
entries.notes: 200 req/hour free. Backup stock photos.

entries.name: Mapbox
entries.notes: 50K map loads/month free. Maps and location display.

entries.name: Google Gemini (Smart Import AI)
entries.notes: Free tier with limited RPM/RPD. Recipe parsing, contingency plans, social captions.

entries.name: Open-Meteo / Nager.Date / Frankfurter / IP-API
entries.notes: All free, no API key needed. Weather, holidays, currency, timezone detection.

entries.name: Ollama (Local LLM Runtime)
entries.notes: Free, open source. Runs qwen3:4b, qwen3-coder:30b, qwen3:30b locally.

entries.name: NordVPN (NordLynx)
entries.notes: Personal subscription — not a ChefFlow cost. Running on dev PC.

entries.name: Next.js / React / Tailwind / TypeScript / Playwright
entries.notes: All free, open source. Core application stack.
